welcome.title: Welcome!
welcome.description: Let's set up your workspace. This will only take a minute and you can always change these settings later.

general.title: General Settings
general.description: Configure your language, timezone, and date format preferences.
general.languageDescription: Select your preferred language for the interface
general.timezoneDescription: Set your local timezone for accurate timestamps

appearance.title: Appearance
appearance.description: Personalize the look and feel of your workspace.
appearance.themeDescription: Choose between light, dark, or system theme
appearance.radiusDescription: Adjust the roundness of UI elements

typography.title: Typography
typography.description: Select your preferred font style for the interface.
typography.fontDescription: Choose the font that suits your reading preference

profile.title: Your Profile
profile.description: Tell us a bit about yourself. You can always update this later.

complete.title: You're All Set!
complete.description: Your workspace has been configured. You can always change these settings from the Settings page.
